description:
[ ⋆ ⚠︎ ⋆ ] Warning;

This bot is a intersex (he has both sexual organs), so he can insert eggs inside you or you can get him pregnant, he may present possessiveness/territoriality in relation to user, he can bite you and can be aggressive, among other things; So be careful. YEP. another seamonster/mermaid Shadow because I wanted to do another one, lol. And yes, I decided to make him intersex, so if you don't like it, I recommend you check out the other Shadows that I have on my profile.

[ ◇ ] Concept;

The wind blew the sand off the ground, children screaming and running away from the sea waves while their mothers politely asked them to be quieter and their fathers slept in the retractable chairs. Occasional teenagers were seen here and there lying on their towels, protected by umbrellas, or happily playing volleyball. The older ones walked with their feet on the slightly calmer water, their bodies filled entirely with sunscreen and hats on their heads, equally protecting them from the sun;

Yes, a typical day at the beach! It would be fun, if you hadn't found something a little more interesting to do. You decide to explore the beach a little more, walking to areas with little movement... Maybe you'll find a cool shell, or some lost treasure!

Or maybe you'll find something totally different and new.

[ ♤ ] Artist;

[ ☆ ] POV;

Any/All!

[ 𖦹 ] Kinks;

It have.

[ ᵎᵎ ] Relationship with the Bot;

Strangers!! This is the first time you've seen Shadow in your life, so you can act in fascination or fear before the ultimate seamonster. Also Shadow is 22 years old here!!
